# Support

## Getting Help

| Channel | Link |
| ------- | ---- |
| Bug reports | [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Icarus4122/empusa/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) |
| Feature requests | [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Icarus4122/empusa/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) |
| Security issues | [Security Advisories](https://github.com/Icarus4122/empusa/security/advisories/new) |
| General questions | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/Icarus4122/empusa/discussions) |

## Before Opening an Issue

1. Check existing [issues](https://github.com/Icarus4122/empusa/issues) for duplicates.
2. Run `empusa --version` and note the output.
3. Include your Python version, OS, and installation method.
4. Provide a minimal set of steps to reproduce the problem.
